overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia running through open grasslands at night. The character transitions from tall grass onto a dirt path while the camera follows from behind, eventually rotating to reveal the starry night sky before continuing along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass in open field at night with swords on back

entered.detail: dense cluster of dark pine trees on the left side of the meadow
tall green grass covering the ground with scattered wildflowers
dark tree line silhouetted against the night sky on the horizon
dark blue night sky with scattered visible stars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt running through an open grassland at night. Tall grass surrounds the path while a dense cluster of pine trees stands to the left. The night sky is clear with visible stars above the dark horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path through grassland with stone wall

events.description: character transitions from grassy terrain onto a narrow dirt path
camera rotates 360 degrees around character to show the starry night sky and surroundings

agents.ego_description: running along the dirt path while the camera orbits to reveal the night sky and the character's face

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail cutting through the grass
low stone wall running parallel to the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves from grass onto a dirt path bordered by a low stone wall on the right. Midway through the segment, the camera performs a dramatic orbit around Geralt, showcasing the starry night sky with scattered clouds before returning to the follow position.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt trail through rolling grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing to run steadily along the dirt path through open fields

entered.detail: rolling hills visible on the dark horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt continuing along the dirt path through more open terrain. The stone wall has fallen behind, and rolling hills become visible in the distance ahead. The path stretches forward through the sparse vegetation under the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal landscape that transitions from dense grasslands to an open dirt trail under a starry sky. It begins with Geralt running through tall grass beside a cluster of pine trees, with the clear night sky visible above the dark horizon. As he moves from the grass onto a dirt path bordered by a low stone wall, the camera performs a dramatic orbit around the character to showcase the scattered clouds and stars before returning to a follow position. The scene then opens up as the stone wall falls behind, shifting the focus toward rolling hills in the distance. Finally, the camera continues along the path through sparse vegetation as it stretches forward into the open terrain.
